text:
{"fixed_xml":"<ITEM>2. Bey Herrn Euler dem Buchbinder am Rheinsprung ist zu erfragen, wo folgende Bücher iraisonablem Preiß zu haben seyen : <BIBL><TITLE>Janii & Tremellii Biblia cum Annotationibus</TITLE></BIBL>; <BIBL><TITLE>Acta Eruditorum Lipsiensia</TITLE> de An. <YEAR>1738</YEAR>. & <YEAR>1739</YEAR>.</BIBL> <BIBL><AUTHOR>Mohemii</AUTHOR> <TITLE>institutiones histor. Christ.</TITLE> maiores <VOLUME>1. Seculi</VOLUME>, samtl. in <FORMAT>4to</FORMAT>.</BIBL> <BIBL><TITLE>Titus Livius</TITLE> ex Editione <AUTHOR>Joannis Clerici</AUTHOR></BIBL>; <BIBL><AUTHOR>Ovidii</AUTHOR> <TITLE>Tristiam & Epistolae ex Ponto</TITLE> mit <AUTHOR>Sinceri</AUTHOR> Anmerckungen</BIBL>; <BIBL><AUTHOR>Herodianus</AUTHOR> Graece & Latine cum notis <AUTHOR>Bocceri</AUTHOR></BIBL>; <BIBL><AUTHOR>Elianus</AUTHOR> Graece & Latine cum notis <AUTHOR>Schefferi</AUTHOR></BIBL>; <BIBL><AUTHOR>Schrevelii</AUTHOR> <TITLE>Lexicon Graeco Latinum & Lat. Graec.</TITLE></BIBL>; <BIBL><AUTHOR>Nisselii</AUTHOR> <TITLE>Biblia Hebraea</TITLE></BIBL>; und <BIBL><AUTHOR>Buxtorfii</AUTHOR> <TITLE>Lexicon</TITLE>, samtl. in <FORMAT>8vo</FORMAT>.</BIBL></ITEM>","number_of_corrections":7,"explanation":"
1. Replaced corrupted Unicode sequences '√ü' (∜ü) with correct character 'ü' in 'Bücher' (Bü√ücher → Bücher).
2. Replaced corrupted Unicode sequence '√ü' in 'Preiß' (Prei√ü → Preiß).
3. Replaced corrupted Unicode sequence '√≤' in FORMAT '4t√≤' with the correct abbreviation '4to'.
4. Replaced corrupted Unicode sequence '√≤' in FORMAT '8v√≤' with the correct abbreviation '8vo'.
5. Fixed a missing closing tag for the third BIBL element (the one containing Mohemii): the original had a nested opening BIBL tag instead of a closing tag, creating invalid nesting. Closed the BIBL after the FORMAT element and removed the erroneous nested BIBL opening.
6. Escaped all bare '&' ampersands as '&' throughout the XML to make it well-formed (affected: 'Janii & Tremellii', 'An. 1738. & 1739.', 'Tristiam & Epistolae', 'Graece & Latine' ×2, 'Lat. Graec.').
7. Removed the spurious nested/unclosed BIBL tag that appeared inside the Mohemii BIBL block before the Titus Livius entry.
"}
